creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like this bug is specific to multi-display configurations, as I never observed it myself and I always use only one display.  This bug should probably be reported upstream either at https://github.com/ugetdm/uget/issues or via https://ugetdm.com/qa/ rather than against the FreeBSD port as we package it almost verbatim.

See also another, possibly related issue (no responses, unfortunately).
